_comment: Phase 2.5 mini-benchmark spec. 3 small single-module JUnit5 Maven repos. Whole-class targets (no method) avoid signature guesswork. Run AFTER the 1-case smoke (benchmarks/smoke.json) passes. Coverage is skipped by default (see .env TESTAGENT_MVN_EXTRA_ARGS -Djacoco.skip=true) so cases report coverage_unavailable; the focus is compile/exec/pass on real code.
